Main UI for the Movie Explorer application

movies_ui.Rd

Builds a bslib::page_sidebar() layout with filter controls in the sidebar and the scatter plot in the main panel.

Usage

movies_ui()

Value

A shiny.tag UI definition.

See also

movies_server(), launch_app()

Other Application Components: launch_app(), movies_server()

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
shiny::shinyApp(ui = movies_ui(), server = movies_server)
} # }

On this page
